tools.name: search_apis
tools.description: Search for API endpoints by keyword across all documentation files. Returns summarized results.

tools.name: list_all_apis
tools.description: List all available API endpoints (method + path). No parameters required. Use this to get a complete overview of the API surface.

tools.name: get_api_details
tools.description: Get full details including schema and parameters for a specific API endpoint.

tools.name: get_changes
tools.description: Get API endpoint changelog. Shows what endpoints/parameters were added, removed, or modified across versions. Includes enum changes when available.

tools.name: get_enums
tools.description: Get all Java enum definitions from the API codebase. Returns enum names and their constant values.

findings.description: Parameter 'query' accepts arbitrary string input for execution
Parameter 'path' accepts arbitrary file paths without validation
Parameter 'path' accepts arbitrary file paths without validation
